author: lOrm
content: Forensic verification: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings is currently EXIT 0 with [lints.clippy] all/pedantic/nursery/cargo = deny in Cargo.toml. The 10 enumerated findings are stale relative to the current tree: src/vdd/mod.rs is now 46 lines (not 1033-1034 - vdd was split into a module); src/prompt.rs:247 contains no Agency/Quality/Scope imports (only string literals in tests at lines 274-276); src/compaction.rs:1122 has no .clone() (it is an .await.unwrap()); src/memory.rs:158 is an enum variant doc comment; src/pipeline.rs:576 destructures SseLineCapOutcome::Exceeded { discarded_bytes } (not trivially equatable); src/tui/app.rs:1205 is a format! line in a [&str; N] array; src/tui/app.rs:1583 contains no cast; src/tui/events.rs:114 binds key by deref from Copy CEvent; src/tui/mod.rs:667 is a doc comment. The codebase has been refactored since these findings were filed and the underlying lints no longer trigger. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore] introduced. Closing as verified-fixed-by-refactor.
